Focus on AI/tech, NOT real estate. Selected by WEF as one of 17 innovative funds. Speaker at Milken Institute. May be lower priority unless pivoting into tech RE.

contacts.notes: CDPQ Singapore

contacts.title: Investment Director
contacts.notes: Becca has met him. Works for single family office in HK, looks for investments in Asia. Had one office deal they exited in Farringdon last year
contacts.aiComments: Investment Director at Park Capital Group (HK family office). University of Nottingham graduate. Limited public profile but confirmed RE focus. UK track record (Farringdon exit) makes him relevant for cross-border deals.

contacts.title: Director, Real Estate Investments, Asia

Member of FondsForum Asia Advisory Board. BS from NYU Stern. CPPIB does large-scale JVs/partnerships - could be strategic partner for bigger deals.

contacts.name: Jonathan Umali
contacts.title: Director, Investment & Asset Management / Investment Committee

contacts.aiComments: 29 years experience. On firm's Investment Committee. Expanded ARCH footprint across Japan, SEA, Australia, Greater China. Speaker at Mingtiandi 2025. Previously senior at Ayala Land (Philippines). MBA from Columbia/Asian Institute of Management. HIGH VALUE - clear sector match (industrial/living).

contacts.title: Unknown

contacts.name: Ellen Ng

contacts.name: John Saunders
contacts.title: Group Chief Investment Officer

Previously: Head of APAC RE at BlackRock, Global Head of RE Client Business, Portfolio Manager for BlackRock Asia Value Add Fund Series. Member of BlackRock RE Global Exec & Investment Committees. 30+ years in HK property. MAJOR INSTITUTIONAL BUYER - high priority.

contacts.name: Pak Man Yuen
contacts.title: Managing Director, Real Estate

Previously Morgan Stanley RE acquisitions. Stanford BS CS, MS Management Science (Phi Beta Kappa, Terman Scholar). Big tickets but active.

contacts.name: Suchad Chiaranussati

Speaker at SEAHIS 2025 and Mingtiandi. LSE Economics, Imperial College MS. Advised Central Bank of Thailand during 1998 crisis. HOSPITALITY EXPERT - relevant if you have hotel deals.

contacts.name: Caroline Dellasega

Previously Director of Investment Strategy at Anken Group. University of Reading. AM Alpha could be co-investor/partner for Europe deals. Model for your FO structure.

contacts.name: Michelle Ling
contacts.title: Chief Investment Officer
contacts.notes: CIO of Hong Kong Land. Just launched S$8.2B Singapore fund. Looking for income-generating assets. Active conversation - sent APAC pipeline Feb 27, awaiting feedback.
contacts.aiComments: HKL pivoting from developer to fund manager. $50B AUM total. CEO Michael Smith (ex-Mapletree) speaking at Mingtiandi Singapore May 12. Target: grow fund to S$15B. Investors include QIA, APG. Looking for origination partners for income-generating assets. PRIORITY RELATIONSHIP.

meetingNotes.notes: Sent APAC pipeline - Seoul office and Sydney industrial deals highlighted. Michelle replied same day: 'will review and let you know if call required'
